notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds into a double play, shortstop Joey Ortiz to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Teoscar Hernández out at 2nd. Miguel Rojas out at 1st.
